originalBlockingIssue: Wrong API port hardcoded (3001) in inline use-tenants implementation. services.yaml defines API on port 3100.

fixVerification.changes: Updated all 5 files to use import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3100'

sharedStateObservations.description: docker-compose.yml defines API on port 3001 while services.yaml defines port 3100. The fix correctly uses services.yaml's port 3100 as the default for agent-based local development.
